name: Britanna Patio Hanging Egg Chair Natural - Threshold™
description:
Curl up in style as you soak in the beauty of a vibrant sunrise or sunset with this Patio Hanging Egg Chair from Threshold™ dressing up any seating arrangement you have in mind. Crafted with a sturdy, all-weather black metal frame, this freestanding patio chair sports a broad circular base and a curved rod from which the egg-shaped chair swings freely, offering a calming, soothing vibe as you kick back and relax. The patio swing chair features a sturdy wicker frame in natural beige with an airy spindle design that makes for a cool and comfy seating experience. This hanging chair comes with a plush cushion that just adds to the seating comfort. Complement with a wicker table to complete the look.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
